introSection: Hurricane Coaster was a steel roller coaster located at Sendai Highland in Sendai, Miyagi, Japan. It was built by Meisho Amusement Machines and had blue track and white supports. It closed with the park on 30 August 2015.
fullText: Hurricane Coaster was a steel roller coaster located at Sendai Highland in Sendai, Miyagi, Japan. It was built by Meisho Amusement Machines and had blue track and white supports. It closed with the park on 30 August 2015.
